data.title: A Trade That Worked In This Market
Algonquin Shares Plunge: Posts Mixed Q2, Sells Renewables Energy Business & Cuts Dividend
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. reports Q2 results and $2.5B sale of renewable energy business, cutting dividend to focus on regulated utilities.

data.title: Skin Cancer-Focused Iovance Biotherapeutics Reports Better-Than-Expected 2024, 2025 Outlook, Stock Surges
data.description: Iovance Biotherapeutics stock up 23.2% after issuing upbeat guidance for 2024 and 2025, beating Q2 earnings expectations.

data.title: What's Going On With SoundHound AI Stock Friday?
data.description: SoundHound AI (SOUN) stock down despite strong Q2 results and raised guidance. Revenue up 54%, EPS beat. Doubled subscriptions & bookings backlog. Acquired Amelia for $80M.

data.title: Chabaidao Cancels Dividend, Nayuki Swings To Red As Bubble Tea Sector Boils Over
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Chabaidao canceled its previously announced dividend, as management said it needs to keep the money for daily operations
	Nayuki said it fell into the red in the first half of this year due to a weak recovery in consumer demand


By Fai Pui
